output.title: Security Deposit Recovery Email Sequence: Demand Letter Templates for Renters
output.meta_description: Get your security deposit back with free demand letter templates. State-specific email scripts and recovery guides for US renters. Act before your deadline.
content_outline: Email 1: The 24-Hour Demand — Security Deposit Demand Letter Template
Email 2: The Deadline & State Law Reminder — How to Get Security Deposit Back
Email 3: The Escalation Warning — Landlord Won't Return Security Deposit
Email 4: The Final Notice — Demand Letter for Security Deposit Refund
key_points: Subject Line 1: 'Action required: Your security deposit demand letter is ready ([State] template)' — Body: Open with the legal deadline the landlord has already missed. Introduce the free security deposit demand letter template, emphasize that every day of delay can trigger statutory penalties, and instruct the reader to send via certified mail.

Subject Line 2: 'Still waiting? How to get your security deposit back in [State]' — Body: Reference the exact number of days the landlord has exceeded under state law. Position the security deposit return letter as the documented evidence required before filing in small claims court, and include a checklist of deductions landlords cannot legally make.

Subject Line 3: 'Re: Withholding your deposit is illegal — security deposit letter to landlord attached' — Body: Address the 'landlord won't return security deposit' pain point with a firm but professional tone. Reference the prior letter to landlord about security deposit, attach a PDF demand letter for security deposit, and outline the next steps: mediation, small claims, or statutory penalties.

Subject Line 4: 'Final notice: Security deposit refund letter enclosed' — Body: State clearly that this is the last written warning before legal action. Provide a concise guide on how to write a security deposit letter that courts accept, then offer DepositBack's automated tool as the fastest way to generate a state-compliant, signed, and certified demand letter.
output.cta: Generate your state-specific security deposit demand letter in under 5 minutes. DepositBack formats, prints, and mails it certified—so you don't have to.
output.target_audience: US renters who have moved out within the last 30-60 days and have not received their full security deposit or a legally required itemized deduction statement from their landlord.
